title: Meridian Balanced Income Portfolio
content:
MERIDIAN WEALTH PARTNERS - INTERNAL PRODUCT FACTSHEET

Meridian Balanced Income Portfolio (MBIP)
Product Code: MWP-BIP-001
Inception Date: March 2019
Minimum Investment: $250,000

INVESTMENT OBJECTIVE
The Meridian Balanced Income Portfolio seeks to provide current income and modest capital appreciation through a diversified allocation of fixed-income securities and dividend-focused equity positions. The portfolio targets a net annual yield of 4.5-6.2% while maintaining moderate risk exposure suitable for clients seeking steady income generation.

PORTFOLIO COMPOSITION (as of last review)
Fixed Income Securities: 65-75%
- Investment Grade Corporate Bonds: 35%
- U.S. Treasury Securities: 20% 
- Municipal Bonds: 10%
- High-Yield Corporate Bonds: 10%
Dividend-Paying Equities: 20-25%
Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs): 5-10%
Cash and Cash Equivalents: 2-5%

PERFORMANCE SUMMARY
Trailing 12-Month Net Return: 3.8%
3-Year Annualized Return: 5.2%
5-Year Annualized Return: 4.7%
Standard Deviation (3-year): 8.4%
Sharpe Ratio: 0.62
Maximum Drawdown: -11.2% (March 2020)

RISK CONSIDERATIONS
This moderate-risk portfolio is subject to interest rate risk, credit risk, and market volatility. Duration risk is managed through laddered maturities averaging 4.2 years. Credit exposure is diversified across sectors with no single issuer representing more than 3% of fixed-income holdings. Equity positions focus on established dividend aristocrats with 10+ year track records.

SUITABILITY ANALYSIS
Per FINRA Rule 2111 suitability requirements, advisors must ensure this product aligns with client investment objectives, risk tolerance, and financial situation. The MBIP is appropriate for clients with moderate risk tolerance seeking income generation, typically those within 5-15 years of retirement or conservative investors requiring portfolio income. Not suitable for clients seeking aggressive growth or those unable to withstand potential principal fluctuations of 10-15%.

FEE STRUCTURE
Management Fee: 0.85% annually
Performance Fee: 10% of returns exceeding 5% annually
Transaction Costs: Pass-through at cost
Estimated Total Expense Ratio: 1.12%

TAX CONSIDERATIONS
Municipal bond allocation provides tax-advantaged income for high-net-worth clients in elevated tax brackets. Qualified dividend income from equity positions receives preferential tax treatment. Tax-loss harvesting strategies are employed when appropriate to optimize after-tax returns.

COMPLIANCE NOTES
Advisors must document suitability determinations in client files. Annual reviews required for all MBIP positions. Enhanced due diligence required for clients over age 65 per firm policy. This product requires Tier 2 advisor certification minimum. All recommendations must include risk disclosure documentation and signed client acknowledgment.

MARKET OUTLOOK
Current interest rate environment presents opportunities in shorter-duration securities. Federal Reserve policy changes may impact portfolio positioning. Recommend quarterly allocation reviews given current market conditions.

CONTACT INFORMATION
Product Management: ext. 4721
Compliance Questions: ext. 4800
Client Servicing: ext. 4600

IMPORTANT: This document contains confidential proprietary information for internal use only. Distribution limited to authorized Meridian Wealth Partners personnel.
